items.about_product: Make sure this fits by entering your model number. | READY TO HANG - Prefabricated keyhole cut-out to be hung with any nail, screw, or other basic wall hanging hardware | MADE IN THE USA - All Stupell Industies products are made in Rhode Island and shipped from the USA. Please be aware of counterfeit sellers with inferior products. Our products will never ship from outside the USA. | Lithograph Print Mounted on Sturdy 0.5 Inch MDF (wood) | DIMENSIONS: Item measures 11 Length x 0.5 Depth x 15 Height Inches | APPLICATION - Perfect décor addition to any wall for a living room, bedroom, bathroom, kids room, kitchen, office, hotel, dining room, bar etc. | A great addition to any kids room or play area
items.technical_details: Size:10x15  |  Style Name:Wall Plaque Product Description Proudly made in the USA, all of our wall plaques start off as high quality lithograph prints that are then mounted on durable MDF wood. Each piece is hand finished and comes with a fresh layer of foil on the sides to give it a crisp clean look. It Arrives ready to hang with no installation required, and comes with sturdy clear corners to keep it from damaging in transit. Please note, our products are proudly made in the United States. Any products shipped from outside of the United States from a third party seller is likely a counterfeit product, and may result in an undesirable buying experience. For example, lower quality goods and longer ship times. From the Manufacturer Stupell Industries has been providing quality wall art and decorative accessories for over forty years. Offering wall art and home décor in a variety of themes, mediums and sizes. Stupell’s products range from canvas wall art, wood wall art, and framed giclée art. No matter the style, our modern, contemporary, traditional, or baby wall art and home decor is crafted with the utmost consideration and care. All of our products are proudly made in the USA, and are brought to life at our facilities in Johnston, RI. | 2.65 pounds (View shipping rates and policies)
items.description: Adorable "I Love You to the Moon and Back" wall plaque for your baby's nursery!  This charming pink and white rectangle plaque (11x0.5x15 inches) adds a sweet touch to any kid's room. Proudly made in the USA. Perfect baby shower gift! #nurserydecor #walldecor #babyroomdecor #kidsroomdecor #wallplaque #madeinusa

Includes (1000) green glitter Perler fuse beads. For ages 6 and up. | 2.4 ounces (View shipping rates and policies)
items.description: Unleash your creativity with 1000 shimmering Green Glitter Fairy Dust Perler Beads! Perfect for crafting unique jewelry, keychains, and more.  These high-quality fuse beads offer endless possibilities for kids and adults.  Create dazzling designs with their vibrant sparkle. Buy now and start crafting!

conversation.text: I want to return both items: The Kids Room wall plaque and the Perler Beads Green Glitter Fairy Dust, because both are defective.

Thank you for confirming you wish to return both the wall plaque and the Perler Beads, and that your reason is defectiveness. To proceed fairly and in line with our policy, I need two quick confirmations for each item:

1. Are both items in their original packaging? 2. Once I have these details, I can explain your return options and next steps.
Yes both re in original packing

Thank you for confirming both items are in their original packaging and that your reason for return is defectiveness. To proceed fairly according to our policy, I need one more clarification: can you briefly describe the defects you found with the wall plaque and the Perler Beads? This will help ensure your return is processed correctly under the defective item policy. Once you confirm, I’ll explain your return and refund options.
The wall plaque arrived with a large crack and chipped paint. The Perler Beads package was torn open and many beads were missing or crushed.

Thank you for explaining the defects: the wall plaque arrived with a large crack and chipped paint, and the Perler Beads package was torn open with beads missing or crushed. Since both items are in their original packaging and were sold and fulfilled by Amazon, our policy allows for the return of defective items for a full refund, even if outside the standard return window, as long as the report is within a reasonable timeframe—which is the case here. 

Our standard procedure is to provide a prepaid return shipping label, and your refund will be issued to your original payment method once the return is processed. Would you like to proceed with a full refund to your original payment method and receive your prepaid return label for both items?
yes but can I get something more for so much of my time wasted?

Thank you for your response and for confirming you wish to proceed with the return. I understand your frustration given the defects and the time spent dealing with this. To be fair to all customers, our standard procedure for defective items is a full refund to your original payment method, along with free prepaid return shipping. While we recognize the inconvenience, our return policy does not provide additional compensation for time spent or inconvenience beyond the full refund for the items and shipping. 

I will now process the return and issue your full refund to your original payment method as soon as the returned items are received. You will receive a prepaid shipping label to use for your returns. 

If you have any other concerns or wish to escalate this for further review, please let me know.

resolution.resolution_description: POLICY CONFLICT: Customer requests compensation beyond the policy for inconvenience, despite qualifying for a full refund due to item defects. RESOLUTION: Defective item policy takes precedence, granting a full refund and prepaid return shipping, but does not allow extra compensation for inconvenience. TRADE-OFF: Customer receives a full refund but no additional compensation for time or inconvenience.
conditions: Both items must be returned in original packaging using the provided prepaid label.
Refund will be issued to the original payment method upon receipt and verification of returned items.
No additional compensation is provided beyond refund and prepaid shipping.
resolution.customer_next_steps: Please follow the instructions provided in your return authorization email to print your prepaid return label and send back both items. Once we receive and verify the return, your full refund will be processed automatically to your original payment method. If you wish to escalate your request for further review, please reply to this message.
